name: 34" Round Decorative Wall Mirror - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring extra light to any room with this 34-Inch Round Decorative Wall Mirror from Threshold™. This round wall mirror features a circular design with 34-inch diameter to cover a larger portion of the wall and create a brighter and more open feel to any room. The mirror is encased by a metal frame and comes with a wall mount so you can easily hang it on any wall. Whether you’re brightening up your living room, dining room or entryway, this large decorative wall mirror is sure to please.

Meet Shea McGee, the designer and stylist behind the brand Studio McGee. Founded alongside her husband, Syd, the studio is known for Shea’s design of beautifully elevated spaces that encourage clients to surround themselves with the things and people they love. Now she’s partnering with Threshold to offer Studio McGee’s classic design in a new collection for inspired homes, everywhere.
